creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I don't think this is a problem in the port itself.

Have you checked up with upstream Nextcloud?

There are additional parameters you can pass in the DSN
https://www.postgresql.org/docs/12/libpq-connect.html#LIBPQ-PARAMKEYWORDS
and even more via the options parameter

https://www.postgresql.org/docs/12/runtime-config.html

I see "password_encryption (enum)" in there.

Closing this, if you find the issue is still with the port, please reopen.
